project_type: TypeScript monorepo package (packages/quant-live) - real-time voice pipeline
build_system: pnpm workspace, tsc for type-checking, vitest for tests. Package is @quant/quant-live.
test_framework: vitest with globals:true. Tests in src/__tests__/*.test.ts. Use vi.fn(), vi.useFakeTimers(), vi.stubGlobal() for mocking.
verification_instructions: 1. Run typecheck: pnpm --filter @quant/quant-live run typecheck. 2. Run tests: pnpm --filter @quant/quant-live run test. Both must pass with zero errors.
setup_instructions: pnpm install in workspace root (already done on this branch)
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET mode. Node 22 + pnpm available. No real API keys for ElevenLabs/Kokoro - tests must be fully mocked.
contribution_requirements: Max 500 LOC per PR (excl generated). New branch feat/phase-41-quant-live-tts from current HEAD. Single commit: feat(quant-live): add streaming TTS with ElevenLabs, Kokoro, prefetch buffer
key_patterns: ASR providers implement ASRProvider interface with start/stop/feedAudio/onResult/onError. Factory pattern in streaming-asr.ts. VoiceActivityDetector uses RMS energy + threshold + event callbacks. LivePipeline orchestrates ASR and tracks latency per segment. TurnManager handles speaker states + interruption. All imports use .js extension suffixes. Types defined in types.ts and re-exported from index.ts. Tests use createMockProvider/createMockSession helper patterns.
directory_structure: packages/quant-live/src/ has: types.ts (shared types), index.ts (barrel exports), core/ (pipeline, session-manager, latency-tracker), asr/ (VAD, whisper providers, factory), conversation/ (turn-manager, transcript), __tests__/ (vitest test files)
